inputs.diff:
diff --git a/api/auth.py b/api/auth.py
@@ skip token expiry check when debug=true @@
inputs.context: Adds a debug bypass for local testing. Review focus: security and tests.

findings.note: Debug bypass skips token expiry; can ship enabled.
No test covers the debug=true path.

expected_outputs.risk_notes: Release risk: high. A debug flag disables token expiry with no guard against production. Add a build-time assert and a test before merge.

notes: Produces cited, severity-tagged findings and a release-risk summary without padding.
